Name of bucket: Members with open care gaps for preventive measures and prior SMS engagement
Rational of the bucket: This bucket exists because members with open care gaps for preventive measures and prior SMS engagement are more likely to convert. The primary success metric is conversion rate, and this bucket is optimized for it by targeting members who have already engaged with the app and have a care gap that needs to be addressed. The suggested treatment is to send a personalized message with a scheduling link to these members.
Suggested treatment: Send a personalized message with a scheduling link to members with open care gaps for preventive measures and prior SMS engagement.
SQL: SELECT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members INNER JOIN marketing_ai.care_gaps ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.care_gaps.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.consent_preferences ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.enrollments ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.sms_events ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.sms_events.member_id WHERE marketing_ai.care_gaps.status = 'OPEN' AND marketing_ai.care_gaps.measure_category IN ('Preventive', 'Diabetes', 'Hypertension') AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE AND marketing_ai.members.status = 'ACTIVE' AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_type IN ('clicked', 'opened') AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_timestamp > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days'

Name of bucket: Members with prior SMS engagement but no open care gaps
Rational of the bucket: This bucket exists because members with prior SMS engagement but no open care gaps are still likely to be interested in preventive care. The primary success metric is open rate, and this bucket is optimized for it by targeting members who have already engaged with the app. The suggested treatment is to send a general health and wellness message to these members.
Suggested treatment: Send a general health and wellness message to members with prior SMS engagement but no open care gaps.
SQL: SELECT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members INNER JOIN marketing_ai.consent_preferences ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.enrollments ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.sms_events ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.sms_events.member_id WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE AND marketing_ai.members.status = 'ACTIVE' AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_type IN ('clicked', 'opened') AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_timestamp > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days'

Name of bucket: Members with no prior SMS engagement
Rational of the bucket: This bucket exists because members with no prior SMS engagement are less likely to be familiar with the app and its features. The primary success metric is click rate, and this bucket is optimized for it by targeting members who have not engaged with the app before. The suggested treatment is to send a welcome message with a link to the app's features and benefits.
Suggested treatment: Send a welcome message with a link to the app's features and benefits to members with no prior SMS engagement.
SQL: SELECT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members INNER JOIN marketing_ai.consent_preferences ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.enrollments ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE AND marketing_ai.members.status = 'ACTIVE' AND marketing_ai.members.member_id NOT IN (SELECT member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE event_timestamp > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')

Name of bucket: Members with a propensity score decile of 1-3
Rational of the bucket: This bucket exists because members with a low propensity score decile are less likely to engage with the app. The primary success metric is conversion rate, and this bucket is optimized for it by targeting members who are less likely to convert. The suggested treatment is to send a personalized message with a scheduling link to these members.
Suggested treatment: Send a personalized message with a scheduling link to members with a propensity score decile of 1-3.
SQL: SELECT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members INNER JOIN marketing_ai.propensity_scores ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.propensity_scores.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.consent_preferences ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id INNER JOIN marketing_ai.enrollments ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id WHERE marketing_ai.propensity_scores.decile IN (1, 2, 3) AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE AND marketing_ai.members.status = 'ACTIVE'
